empty.body: You'll see XP milestones, achievements, and course updates here.

hero.title: Master Solana Development, Earn On-Chain Credentials
hero.subtitle: The hands-on learning platform for Solana builders. Complete interactive courses, earn soulbound XP, and collect verifiable credentials that prove your skills on-chain.

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to go from zero to shipping Solana programs

interactiveLessons.title: Interactive Lessons
interactiveLessons.description: Write, compile, and deploy Solana programs directly in your browser. No setup required.

onChainCredentials.title: On-Chain Credentials
onChainCredentials.description: Earn verifiable ZK-compressed credentials that prove your skills. Upgradeable as you progress through each track.

soulboundXP.title: Soulbound XP
soulboundXP.description: Earn non-transferable XP tokens on Solana. Your balance is your reputation, visible on the public leaderboard.

learningPaths.title: Structured Learning Paths
learningPaths.description: Follow curated tracks from beginner to advanced across Anchor, Rust, DeFi, and security.

streaksAndGamification.title: Streaks & Gamification
streaksAndGamification.description: Build daily learning habits with streaks, achievements, and level progression that keep you motivated.

creatorRewards.title: Creator Rewards
creatorRewards.description: Course creators earn XP when students complete their courses. Build the curriculum and get rewarded.

paths.sectionSubtitle: Choose your path to Solana mastery

anchor.title: Anchor Framework
anchor.description: Build Solana programs with the most popular framework. From account structures to CPIs.

rust.title: Rust for Solana
rust.description: Master Rust fundamentals tailored for on-chain development. Ownership, lifetimes, and performance.

defi.title: DeFi Development
defi.description: Build AMMs, lending protocols, and vaults. Understand token economics and composability.

security.title: Program Security
security.description: Learn to audit Solana programs. Identify common vulnerabilities and write secure code.

popularCourses.title: Popular Courses
popularCourses.subtitle: Start with our most popular developer courses.

items.name: Ana Souza
items.quote: Superteam Academy's hands-on approach helped me go from zero to deploying my first Anchor program in two weeks. The XP system kept me coming back daily.

items.name: Carlos Mendes
items.quote: The interactive code challenges are incredible. I learned more about PDAs and CPIs in a weekend than I did in a month of reading docs.

items.name: Priya Patel
items.quote: Finally a structured learning path for Solana. The on-chain credentials are a great addition to my portfolio and proof of real skills.

cta.title: Ready to Build on Solana?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of developers earning verifiable credentials. Connect your wallet and start your first course today.

assessment.title: Test Your Knowledge
assessment.subtitle: Answer 6 quick questions so we can gauge your starting level

q1.question: What does async/await do in JavaScript?
q1.a: Makes code run in parallel threads
q1.b: Pauses execution until a promise resolves

q2.question: In blockchain, what is a transaction?
q2.a: A file stored on a distributed database
q2.c: Signed instruction(s) submitted to the network
q2.d: A mining reward distributed to validators

q3.question: What is a Program Derived Address (PDA) on Solana?
q3.a: A wallet address generated from a seed phrase
q3.b: A deterministic address derived from seeds, without a private key
q3.c: The address of a deployed Solana program
q3.d: An address used only for token transfers

q4.question: What is the primary purpose of Rust's ownership system?
q4.b: Managing access control in web applications
q4.c: Guaranteeing memory safety without a garbage collector

q5.question: In Anchor, what does the #[account] attribute do?
q5.a: Defines how an account is deserialized and validated
q5.b: Creates a new Solana wallet address
q5.c: Specifies the rent-exempt balance for an account
q5.d: Marks a function as a public RPC endpoint

q6.question: How does an AMM (Automated Market Maker) determine token prices?
q6.a: By matching buy and sell orders in an order book
q6.b: Through an algorithmic formula based on pool ratios
q6.c: By querying an off-chain price oracle

results.title: Your Personalized Path
results.subtitle: Based on your answers, here's where to start
results.levelDescriptionBeginner: Great starting point — we'll recommend foundational courses to build your skills from the ground up.
results.levelDescriptionIntermediate: Solid foundation — you're ready for framework-specific courses and hands-on projects.
results.levelDescriptionProfessional: Strong expertise — you're prepared for production-grade development and complex system design.
results.levelDescriptionAdvanced: Impressive knowledge — dive into advanced topics like security auditing and DeFi protocol design.
